# Vibe Investing

> AI-powered market analysis and trading tools at the intersection of artificial intelligence and global financial markets. Covers NASDAQ, S&P 500, crypto, and key tech themes like semiconductor geopolitics.

## Featured Column: Samsung and SK Hynix – The Unavoidable Gatekeepers of the AI Revolution
- Explores the structural memory shortage driven by AI, agentic AI’s soaring memory demands, Korea’s geopolitical advantage over Taiwan, and record financials for Samsung and SK Hynix.
- Includes orders, revenue forecasts, and analyst projections for 2026–2027.

## Tools & Agents
- **Harness Quant v2** – quantitative strategy engine.
- **Earnings Momentum Agent** – AI-driven earnings analysis.
- Repository contains backtesting frameworks, data pipelines, and investment theses.

## Repository
- GitHub: https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/
- Maintained by Kim (Gameworker) – quant analyst / AI researcher.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gameworkerkim
